level_signals: Expected to present to senior leadership and drive cross-team alignment
High degree of ownership and autonomy expected

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 7+ years of product management experience, ideally in fintech, lending, or platform-focused roles
must_haves.qualifier: ideally in fintech, lending, or platform-focused roles

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Proven track record of owning complex product areas or platforms and delivering measurable business impact
Experience defining product strategy and driving execution across multiple teams or squads
Strong systems thinking, with the ability to connect user experiences, platform capabilities, and business outcomes
Experience working on technically complex systems, with the ability to partner deeply with engineering on architecture and trade-offs
Data-driven mindset with experience defining metrics, running experiments, and using insights to inform decisions
Exceptional communication and stakeholder management skills, including experience influencing across teams and presenting to senior leadership
Ability to operate with a high degree of ownership and autonomy in ambiguous, fast-paced environments

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience with lending or financial services products, particularly originations or underwriting flows
Familiarity with credit decisioning systems or risk models
Experience building platform capabilities or shared infrastructure used across multiple teams
Experience optimizing application funnels, conversion, and user flows
Background working with servicing, collections, or post-origination systems
Experience driving large-scale technical initiatives requiring cross-team alignment

explicitly_excluded: Remote work from Hawaii or Alaska (due to insurance coverage issues)

scope.surface: Originations Core platform — Borrow experience across web and mobile, reusable UI systems, application entry points, application data models, credit decisioning infrastructure
primary_metrics_inferred: Platform velocity and reuse across product teams
Reliability and scalability of originations infrastructure
core_responsibilities: Define and drive the product vision, strategy, and multi-quarter roadmap for Originations Core
Own and evolve the Borrow experience across web and mobile, including application entry points, flows, and supporting UI systems
Lead the development of reusable UI components and shared capabilities across multiple product teams
Drive strategy and execution for core originations infrastructure, including application data models and credit decisioning systems
Act as the central product partner for cross-functional domains such as servicing, collections, and settlements
Partner with multiple PMs and engineering teams to align roadmaps, manage dependencies, and drive cohesive product outcomes
Identify and lead high-impact technical initiatives and build cross-team alignment
Define success metrics and use data to evaluate performance and guide prioritization
Communicate product strategy and progress to senior leadership and cross-functional stakeholders

green_flags: Clear product surface and ownership area described in depth (Originations Core within Borrow)
Role spans both member-facing and platform/infrastructure — high leverage position
SoFi is a national bank with millions of members — meaningful scale
EEO and San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance compliance mentioned — inclusive hiring signals
Remote work appears broadly available (no office requirement stated in body)
Nice-to-haves are genuinely separated from must-haves — well-structured JD
red_flags: Base pay range referenced but not actually disclosed ('listed below' — range missing from scraped content)
Visa sponsorship policy not stated — unclear for non-citizen candidates
Location type is ambiguous — no city listed, no explicit remote/hybrid policy stated in body
Compensation details are entirely absent despite a section header promising them

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title 'Principal' + 7+ years requirement + cross-team scope)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly listed in JD)
location.type (unclear — no city, no explicit remote/hybrid policy stated; remote partially inferred from Hawaii/Alaska exclusion implying remote is possible)
location.remote_us_eligible (inferred from Hawaii/Alaska exclusion language implying remote is generally allowed)
